Bash(python3 -c "
f = open\('/mnt/c/Users/ni3054ch/Work Folders/Documents/Projects/!med/med_moving_intentions/data/Giedre_Lev_prospective.txt', encoding='latin-1'\)
lines = f.readlines\(\)
f.close\(\)
print\('Total rows \(incl header\):', len\(lines\)\)
print\('Total data rows:', len\(lines\)-1\)
headers = lines[0].strip\(\).split\('\\t'\)
print\('Total columns:', len\(headers\)\)
# Show first few data rows for T1/T2/T3 indicator cols and key vars
h = headers
t1_idx = h.index\('T1'\)
t2_idx = h.index\('T2'\)
t3_idx = h.index\('T3'\)
date_t1_idx = h.index\('Date_T1'\)
date_t2_idx = h.index\('Date_T2'\)
date_t3_idx = h.index\('Date_T3'\)
reloc_idx = h.index\('relocated'\)
nr_reloc_idx = h.index\('nr_reloc'\)
lopnr_idx = h.index\('LopNr_PersonNr'\)
var24_idx = h.index\('VAR24_T1'\)
print\(\)
print\('T1 col index:', t1_idx\)
print\('T2 col index:', t2_idx\)
print\('T3 col index:', t3_idx\)
# Count non-empty T1, T2, T3 indicator values in data rows
t1_vals = [l.strip\(\).split\('\\t'\)[t1_idx] for l in lines[1:]]
t2_vals = [l.strip\(\).split\('\\t'\)[t2_idx] for l in lines[1:]]
t3_vals = [l.strip\(\).split\('\\t'\)[t3_idx] for l in lines[1:]]
date_t1_vals = [l.strip\(\).split\('\\t'\)[date_t1_idx] for l in lines[1:]]
date_t2_vals = [l.strip\(\).split\('\\t'\)[date_t2_idx] for l in lines[1:]]
date_t3_vals = [l.strip\(\).split\('\\t'\)[date_t3_idx] for l in lines[1:]]
from collections import Counter
print\('T1 value counts:', Counter\(t1_vals\)\)
print\('T2 value counts:', Counter\(t2_vals\)\)
print\('T3 value counts:', Counter\(t3_vals\)\)
print\('Date_T1 non-empty:', sum\(1 for v in date_t1_vals if v not in \('', 'NA'\)\)\)
print\('Date_T2 non-empty:', sum\(1 for v in date_t2_vals if v not in \('', 'NA'\)\)\)
print\('Date_T3 non-empty:', sum\(1 for v in date_t3_vals if v not in \('', 'NA'\)\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
f = open\('/mnt/c/Users/ni3054ch/Work Folders/Documents/Projects/!med/med_moving_intentions/data/Giedre_Lev_prospective.txt', encoding='latin-1'\)
lines = []
for line in f:
    lines.append\(line.rstrip\('\\n'\).rstrip\('\\r'\)\)
f.close\(\)
print\('Total rows \(incl header\):', len\(lines\)\)
headers = lines[0].split\('\\t'\)
print\('Total columns:', len\(headers\)\)

# Parse safely
def get_col\(col_name\):
    idx = headers.index\(col_name\)
    result = []
    for line in lines[1:]:
        parts = line.split\('\\t'\)
        val = parts[idx] if idx < len\(parts\) else ''
        result.append\(val\)
    return result

t1_vals = get_col\('T1'\)
t2_vals = get_col\('T2'\)
t3_vals = get_col\('T3'\)
date_t1 = get_col\('Date_T1'\)
date_t2 = get_col\('Date_T2'\)
date_t3 = get_col\('Date_T3'\)
lopnr   = get_col\('LopNr_PersonNr'\)

from collections import Counter
print\('T1 value counts:', Counter\(t1_vals\)\)
print\('T2 value counts:', Counter\(t2_vals\)\)
print\('T3 value counts:', Counter\(t3_vals\)\)
print\('Date_T1 non-empty:', sum\(1 for v in date_t1 if v not in \('', 'NA'\)\)\)
print\('Date_T2 non-empty:', sum\(1 for v in date_t2 if v not in \('', 'NA'\)\)\)
print\('Date_T3 non-empty:', sum\(1 for v in date_t3 if v not in \('', 'NA'\)\)\)
print\('LopNr missing:', sum\(1 for v in lopnr if v in \('', 'NA'\)\)\)
")

f = open\('/mnt/c/Users/ni3054ch/Work Folders/Documents/Projects/!med/med_moving_intentions/data/Giedre_Lev_prospective.txt', encoding='latin-1'\)

f.close\(\)
headers = lines[0].split\('\\t'\)

def get_col\(col_name\):
    idx = headers.index\(col_name\)
    result = []
    for line in lines[1:]:
        parts = line.split\('\\t'\)
        val = parts[idx] if idx < len\(parts\) else ''

    return result

reloc_vals  = get_col\('relocated'\)

reloc_d1    = get_col\('reloc_date1'\)

print\('reloc_date2 non-empty:', sum\(1 for v in reloc_d2 if v not in \('','NA'\)\)\)
print\('reloc_date3 non-empty:', sum\(1 for v in reloc_d3 if v not in \('','NA'\)\)\)
print\('VAR24_T1 value counts:', Counter\(var24\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
f = open\('/mnt/c/Users/ni3054ch/Work Folders/Documents/Projects/!med/med_moving_intentions/data/Giedre_Lev_prospective.txt', encoding='latin-1'\)
lines = []
for line in f:
    lines.append\(line.rstrip\('\\n'\).rstrip\('\\r'\)\)
f.close\(\)
headers = lines[0].split\('\\t'\)

def get_col\(col_name\):
    idx = headers.index\(col_name\)
    result = []
    for line in lines[1:]:
        parts = line.split\('\\t'\)
        val = parts[idx] if idx < len\(parts\) else ''
        result.append\(val\)
    return result

# Check the NA code columns of interest
age_t1    = get_col\('Age_T1'\)
var13_1   = get_col\('VAR13_1_T1'\)
var14_t1  = get_col\('VAR14_T1'\)
var34_t1  = get_col\('VAR34_T1'\)
var16_t1  = get_col\('VAR16_T1'\)
var17_t1  = get_col\('VAR17_T1'\)
var18_t1  = get_col\('VAR18_T1'\)

from collections import Counter
print\('Age_T1 range \(non-empty\):'\)
age_nums = [float\(v\) for v in age_t1 if v not in \('','NA'\)]
print\('  min:', min\(age_nums\), 'max:', max\(age_nums\), 'n:', len\(age_nums\)\)

print\('VAR13_1_T1 value counts:', Counter\(var13_1\)\)
print\('VAR14_T1 value counts:', Counter\(var14_t1\)\)
print\('VAR34_T1 value counts:', Counter\(var34_t1\)\)
print\('VAR16_T1 value counts:', Counter\(var16_t1\)\)
print\('VAR17_T1 value counts:', Counter\(var17_t1\)\)
print\('VAR18_T1 value counts:', Counter\(var18_t1\)\)
")

Bash(python3 -c "
f = open\('/mnt/c/Users/ni3054ch/Work Folders/Documents/Projects/!med/med_moving_intentions/data/Giedre_Lev_prospective.txt', encoding='latin-1'\)
lines = []
for line in f:
    lines.append\(line.rstrip\('\\n'\).rstrip\('\\r'\)\)
f.close\(\)
headers = lines[0].split\('\\t'\)

def get_col\(col_name\):
    idx = headers.index\(col_name\)
    result = []
    for line in lines[1:]:
        parts = line.split\('\\t'\)
        val = parts[idx] if idx < len\(parts\) else ''
        result.append\(val\)
    return result

# Cross-check: relocated==1 with reloc_date1
reloc_vals  = get_col\('relocated'\)
reloc_d1    = get_col\('reloc_date1'\)
reloc_d2    = get_col\('reloc_date2'\)
reloc_d3    = get_col\('reloc_date3'\)
nr_reloc    = get_col\('nr_reloc'\)

# relocated==1 and no reloc_date
n_reloc1 = sum\(1 for r, d in zip\(reloc_vals, reloc_d1\) if r == '1' and d in \('','NA'\)\)
print\('relocated==1 but reloc_date1 is empty:', n_reloc1\)

# relocated==0 and has reloc_date
n_reloc0_date = sum\(1 for r, d in zip\(reloc_vals, reloc_d1\) if r == '0' and d not in \('','NA'\)\)
print\('relocated==0 but reloc_date1 is NOT empty:', n_reloc0_date\)

# stray relocated values \(not 0/1\)
stray = [r for r in reloc_vals if r not in \('0', '1', '', 'NA'\)]
print\('Stray relocated values:', stray\)

# nr_reloc vs relocated inconsistency check
mismatches = [\(r, n\) for r,n in zip\(reloc_vals, nr_reloc\)
              if r == '1' and n == '0']
print\('relocated==1 but nr_reloc==0:', len\(mismatches\)\)
mismatches2 = [\(r, n\) for r,n in zip\(reloc_vals, nr_reloc\)
               if r == '0' and n not in \('0', '', 'NA'\)]
print\('relocated==0 but nr_reloc>0:', len\(mismatches2\)\)
")
